headline: A Look At Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Valuation After New Orders Guidance And AI Infrastructure Product Launches
summary: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) is back in focus after order growth guidance above consensus and a series of new product launches, including Keysight Assembly and new 5G testing tools, sharpened attention on its role in AI infrastructure. See our latest analysis for Keysight Technologies. At a share price of $291.24, Keysight has logged a 90 day share price return of 40.97% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 114.57%. This suggests momentum has been building as product launches and...
